name: Reliance Worldwide Corporation Limited
analysis: RWC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.5100. Trade idea: entry A$3.7200, stop A$3.0591, target A$4.1148 (0.60:1) — then trail it.
